title: ECU Esports Mod Pack
description: This is a basic mod pack for the ECU Esports Minecraft server. It provides mods that add small additions to the SMP.
body:
# Overview
This mod pack is intended to be used on the ECU Esport's Minecraft SMP server. The mod pack contains example mods that will improve your experience on the server. For example, the Simple Voice Chat mod adds proximity chat to the server so that you can communicate directly through Minecraft!

# Installation
Please install the 1.20.1 quilted loaded from this website: https://quiltmc.org/en/install/

1. Once installed, run the game for the first time.
2. Add these mods from the mod pack to your mods folder in %appdata%/.minecraft/mods/
3. Run the game again and you should be good to go!

Note: You may need to edit your key binds because some mods' key binds will overlap with each other.

## Mod List
The pack contains the following mods:
1. Lithium - optimisation
2. Sodium - optimisation
3. Sodium Extra - optimisation
4. Starlight - optimisation
5. Iris - shaders/video quality settings
6. Simple Voice Chat - proximity/group chat
7. Quilt API + Fabric API - dependency APIs
8. Ok Zoomer - scroll zoom
9. Xaero's World Map - world map
10. Xaero's Minimap - minimap & waypoints
11. Mod Menu - menu for all mods
12. Freecam - survival freecam
